items.summary: this game is way too good, its totally different from all the usual gacha games! the story is actually different and unique and i really love it. gameplay: 8.9/10 characters: 10/10 voice acting: 10/10 story: 10/10 optimization pc: 10/10 optimization mobile: 7.5/10 overall a very good game.
